Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "BLADERUNNER-0800" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Blade Runner.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Changed the "DO YOU WANT TO REDEFINE THE KEYS Y N" message string at $2018 to be "GENERATING MAP - PLEASE WAIT..." instead (also added extra $FFs to terminate the shorter string). 2. Changed the LDA #$01 instruction at $0919 to be LDA $04 instead. This causes the generating map message to be indented four spaces on the screen to allow for the shorter string. 3. Changed the LDA #$07 instruction at $092D to be LDA $0B instead. This causes the generating map message to be centred vertically. 3. Patched the LDA $DC00 instruction at $093F to be JMP $095B instead. This simply acts as if the N key was pressed in response the original redefine keys message without waiting for a key.
